meta.score: 0-100 weighted fit score; arithmetic computed in code from model-provided dimensions
meta.eligible_flag: Y = org-eligible for an international finance think tank; N = hard gate (individuals-only, local-registration-only, for-profits-only); ? = verify
meta.no_recommendation: bid decisions are human; the system provides fit + urgency only
meta.days_left: compute client-side from deadline; past deadline = closed
